title: Keybind Sets
description: Ever need to quickly change all of your keybinds? With this mod you can save and load all of your keybinds!
body:
### How to Install:

1. Download the mod.
2. Place it in your `mods` folder.
3. Launch the game.
4. Run `/keybind` save|load <profile name>
5. Enjoy!

### What the Mod Does:

* Save and load all keybinds!
* That includes **custom ones** registered by mods!
* Share keybind files! (by sending around the files)
* Allows you to **quickly change keybind profiles** with a press of a single button!

### Dependencies:
* [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
